info.name: TruckFix — Stripe + Push (full test)
info.description:
Complete Postman pack for Stripe billing/payments and push notifications.

**Import:** `TruckFix.Stripe-Push.postman_environment.json` and select it.

**Run folder `00 — Setup` first** (logins + resolve job IDs).

**Stripe attach:** `paymentMethodId` in body = Stripe `pm_...` (from SetupIntent / Stripe Dashboard / npm run test:stripe).

**Job approve:** `paymentMethodId` = Mongo `_id` from attach response (`fleetPaymentMethodDbId`).

**Push:** Register a real FCM token from your phone for real pushes; placeholder token only tests the API.

Local default: http://127.0.0.1:5000
Production: https://kp-backend-1.onrender.com

request.description: Fills jobIdAwaitingApproval from jobCode TF-8823 or any AWAITING_APPROVAL job.

exec: if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return;
function byCode(code){ return jobs.find(j => j.jobCode === code || j.id === code); }
const codes = { jobIdAwaitingApproval: getVar('jobCodeAwaitingApproval'), jobIdPosted: getVar('jobCodePosted'), jobIdEnRoute: getVar('jobCodeEnRoute') };
Object.entries(codes).forEach(([varName, code]) => { const j = byCode(code); if (j && j._id) setVar(varName, j._id); });

request.description: Returns publishableKey + enabled. Expect enabled:true if STRIPE_* env set.
Creates Stripe customer + SetupIntent. Use clientSecret in mobile Stripe SDK to get pm_...

request.description:
REQUIRED: Set collection var stripePmId to a REAL Stripe pm_... from your account.
Get one: npm run test:stripe (prints pm_) OR Stripe Dashboard test card.
NOT the Mongo id — that goes on job approve only.
Idempotent: same pm_ returns existing card (200/201).

Soft-delete in DB only. Optional cleanup.
